title: 275-System Administrator (Specialized in Linux, Windows Servers, VMware ESXi, and vCenter)
description:
About Ministry of Finance
Directorate of Information Communication Technology at Ministry of Finance mainly focusing in the area providing data and voice services for MoF operations using highly-equipped data center, unified transmission system, and interconnected links via fiber and microwaves.
Directorate of ICT is providing reliable and secure platform for overall data and voice connectivity and access to MoF core application services in MoF HQs and sites.

Job Descriptions
The primary objective of the System Administrator is to design, implement, maintain, and monitor the organization's server and virtualization infrastructure. The role focuses on delivering high availability, security, and efficiency in systems management while supporting business operations.

Job Requirements
Department: ICT Directorate
Location: Ministry of finance
Reports to: Director of ICT / Head of Network Administration
Background
The organization operates a multi-branch enterprise network with centralized data center services. The infrastructure includes Cisco routing and switching, DMVPN WAN architecture, Sophos Next-Generation Firewalls, and VMware virtualization platform. A CCIE-level architect is required to design, secure, and optimize this environment following international best practices.
Key Responsibilities
Server Administration
• Install, configure, and maintain Linux and Windows Server operating systems.
• Manage Active Directory (AD) and Group Policy Objects (GPOs) in Windows environments.
• Ensure regular patch management and updates for Linux and Windows systems.
• Implement and monitor system security measures, including firewalls, intrusion detection, and encryption technologies.
Virtualization Management
• Deploy, configure, and manage VMware ESXi hosts and vCenter infrastructure.
• Monitor and optimize the performance of virtual machines (VMs) and physical hosts.
• Manage VMware-related components such as vSAN, DRS, and HA.
• Handle VM backup, restoration, and disaster recovery procedures.
Systems Maintenance and Monitoring
• Implement monitoring solutions to track the health and performance of systems.
• Conduct root-cause analysis for server and infrastructure-related issues.
• Ensure adherence to best practices in system performance tuning and capacity planning.
Automation and Scripting
• Automate routine administrative tasks using scripting languages like PowerShell, Bash, or Python.
• Develop scripts for backups, monitoring, and system health checks.
Documentation and Reporting
• Create and maintain comprehensive documentation for systems configurations, processes, and procedures.
• Prepare and present regular reports on system performance, incidents, and planned maintenance.
Support and Collaboration
• Provide Level 2/3 technical support for server and virtualization-related issues.
• Collaborate with the network, application, and database teams to ensure seamless IT operations.
• Train junior staff and provide guidance on system-related tasks.
Required Qualifications and Experience
Education:
• Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, or related field.
• Certifications such as RHCSA/RHCE, MCSA/MCSE, VMware VCP-DCV are preferred.
Experience:
• Minimum 3-5 years of experience in Linux and Windows server administration.
• Proven expertise in VMware ESXi and vCenter environments.
• Experience in managing high-availability systems and disaster recovery planning.
Technical Skills:
• Proficiency in Linux (e.g., CentOS, RHEL, Ubuntu) and Windows Server (2016/2019/2022) environments.
• Hands-on experience with VMware vSphere, including vCenter, vSAN, DRS, and HA.
• Strong understanding of TCP/IP, DNS, DHCP, and other networking protocols.
• Knowledge of backup and recovery tools (e.g., Veeam, NetBackup).
• Scripting proficiency in Bash, PowerShell, or Python.
Key Competencies
• Strong problem-solving and analytical skills.
• Excellent communication and documentation skills.
• Ability to work under pressure and meet deadlines.
• Attention to detail and commitment to maintaining high standards.
• Team player with a proactive approach to work.
Deliverables
• A secure and high-performing server and virtualization environment.
• Detailed and updated system documentation.
• Reports on incidents, system performance, and maintenance activities.
• Training sessions and knowledge transfer for ICT staff.

Submission Guidelines
Qualified applicants are encouraged to submit their CVs with a detailed application letter and contact details, no later than 9-Jul-2026 to below e-mail:
Please clearly indicate “position name/vacancy number in the subject line.
Please do not attach your education and working experience documents.

title: 276-Senior Network & Data Center Architect (CCIE Level)
description:
About Ministry of Finance
Directorate of Information Communication Technology at Ministry of Finance mainly focusing in the area providing data and voice services for MoF operations using highly-equipped data center, unified transmission system, and interconnected links via fiber and microwaves.
Directorate of ICT is providing reliable and secure platform for overall data and voice connectivity and access to MoF core application services in MoF HQs and sites.

Job Descriptions
The organization operates a multi-branch enterprise network with centralized data center services. The infrastructure includes Cisco routing and switching, DMVPN WAN architecture, Sophos Next-Generation Firewalls, and VMware virtualization platform. A CCIE-level architect is required to design, secure, and optimize this environment following international best practices.

Job Requirements
. Objectives
• Design scalable and resilient enterprise network architecture.
• Implement secure Cisco DMVPN WAN connectivity.
• Architect Sophos Firewall multi-zone security framework.
• Design Tier-2/Tier-3 Data Center architecture.
• Implement VMware vSphere high-availability clusters.
• Ensure Zero Trust segmentation and high availability.
Cisco Enterprise Network
• Hierarchical Core / Distribution / Access design.
• OSPF multi-area and BGP WAN edge routing.
• HSRP/VRRP gateway redundancy.
• VLAN design and segmentation.
• QoS for ERP and VoIP.
• NetFlow, SNMPv3, and monitoring integration.
DMVPN WAN Architecture
• Dual Hub DMVPN Phase 3 architecture.
• mGRE tunnels with NHRP configuration.
• IPsec IKEv2 with AES-256 encryption.
• Routing over DMVPN (OSPF/EIGRP/BGP).
• IP SLA tracking and automatic failover.
• QoS pre-classify and bandwidth control.
Sophos Firewall
• Multi-zone segmentation (WAN, LAN, DMZ, Server, VPN, Guest).
• IPS, ATP, SSL inspection, Application Control.
• Web Application Firewall for public services.
• Active-Passive High Availability design.
• Firewall rule matrix and Zero Trust policy implementation.
Data Center Design
• Dual core switch design.
• Redundant ISP and firewall connectivity.
• Rack elevation and power redundancy planning.
• Storage network segmentation.
• Disaster Recovery architecture.
VMware Virtualization
• vSphere cluster with HA and DRS.
• Distributed Virtual Switch (VDS).
• Resource sizing and capacity planning.
• Backup and snapshot governance policy.
• Secure management and segmentation.
Security & Compliance
• Micro-segmentation strategy.
• Control Plane Policing (CoPP).
• Certificate-based authentication.
• Logging, SIEM integration, and monitoring.
• Failover testing documentation.
Deliverables
• High-Level Design (HLD).
• Low-Level Design (LLD).
• IP Addressing & VLAN Matrix.
• DMVPN Tunnel Plan.
• Firewall Security Matrix.
• Data Center Physical & Logical Diagrams.
• Disaster Recovery Plan.
• Knowledge Transfer & Documentation.
Required Qualifications
• Cisco CCIE (Enterprise Infrastructure preferred).
• Minimum 10 years enterprise networking experience.
• Proven Sophos Firewall architecture experience.
• Data Center design expertise.
• VMware VCP/VCAP certification preferred.
Performance Indicators (KPIs)
• Network uptime ≥ 99.9%.
• Zero critical misconfiguration findings.
• Successful failover test validation.
• Documented and approved architecture design.

title: 277-Senior Cyber Security Specialist
description:
About Ministry of Finance
Directorate of Information Communication Technology at Ministry of Finance mainly focusing in the area providing data and voice services for MoF operations using highly-equipped data center, unified transmission system, and interconnected links via fiber and microwaves.
Directorate of ICT is providing reliable and secure platform for overall data and voice connectivity and access to MoF core application services in MoF HQs and sites.

Job Descriptions
As the sole dedicated cybersecurity specialist, the primary objective is to act as the MoF’s internal "ethical hacker" and security architect. The role aims to:
Proactively identify and exploit vulnerabilities in the MoF’s networks, applications, and financial systems through rigorous, hands-on penetration testing.
Establish foundational security monitoring and incident response capabilities in the absence of a traditional SOC.
Provide expert technical guidance to the broader ICT team to remediate identified vulnerabilities.
Build a resilient security posture from the ground up, balancing deep technical execution with strategic risk management.

Job Requirements
Scope of Work and Key Responsibilities
Given the standalone nature of this role, the Specialist must be highly self-motivated, capable of deep technical execution, and skilled at prioritizing high-risk areas.
Heavy Penetration Testing & Offensive Security (Core Focus)
Conduct regular, in-depth, hands-on penetration testing on the MoF’s internal/external networks, web applications, APIs, mobile applications, and critical financial systems.
Perform advanced manual testing to identify complex vulnerabilities (e.g., business logic flaws, authentication bypasses, injection attacks) that automated scanners miss.
Conduct social engineering and phishing campaigns to test the human element of the MoF’s security posture.
Vendor Management: While executing continuous internal pen-testing, design the scope for and manage external third-party vendors for comprehensive, enterprise-wide annual penetration tests.
Vulnerability Management & Remediation
Deploy, configure, and manage automated vulnerability scanning tools across the MoF’s infrastructure.
Analyze scan results, filter out false positives, and prioritize vulnerabilities based on the specific threat landscape of the financial sector.
Work directly with system administrators, network engineers, and application developers to verify and validate the remediation of identified flaws.
Foundational Security Monitoring & Incident Response
design, implement, and manage a centralized log management and basic SIEM (Security Information and Event Management) solution.
Act as the primary (Tier 1, 2, and 3) Incident Responder. Investigate security alerts, contain breaches, eradicate threats, and recover systems during a cyber incident.
Develop and maintain automated alerting rules to notify the Specialist and ICT management of critical security events.
Security Architecture & Automation
Advise the ICT Directorate on secure architecture for new financial systems, , and network expansions (Security by Design).
Develop scripts and automate repetitive security tasks (e.g., using Python, Bash, or PowerShell) to maximize efficiency and scale security efforts without additional headcount.
Key Deliverables
Penetration Testing Reports: Comprehensive, technical, and executive-level reports following every internal penetration test, including proof-of-concept exploits and step-by-step remediation guides.
Vulnerability Dashboard: A continuously updated, automated dashboard showing the MoF’s vulnerability posture, aging of critical vulnerabilities, and remediation SLA compliance.
Incident Response Plan (IRP): A documented and tested IRP tailored for a standalone responder, including clear escalation matrices to external law enforcement or emergency IT support.
Security Monitoring Baseline: Successful deployment and tuning of a centralized logging/SIEM solution with active alerts for critical financial systems within the first [6 months].
Quarterly Security Posture Report: An executive summary for the Director of ICT detailing the threat landscape, tests conducted, critical risks discovered, and remediation progress.
Reporting and Coordination
Direct Reporting: Reports directly to the Director of ICT.
Internal Coordination: Works closely with Network Administrators, Database Administrators, and Software Developers to ensure vulnerabilities are patched without disrupting critical treasury operations.
External Coordination: Acts as the technical point of contact for external penetration testing firms, managed security service providers.
Qualifications and Experience
Education:
Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Cybersecurity, Information Technology, or a closely related field.
Experience:
Exactly/At least Seven (7) years of progressive, hands-on professional experience in Cybersecurity, with a heavy emphasis on technical execution rather than pure management.
Minimum of three (3) to four (4) years of dedicated, hands-on experience specifically in Penetration Testing and Offensive Security.
Proven experience conducting pen tests on complex environments, specifically web applications, APIs, and network infrastructure.
Experience operating as a standalone security practitioner or building security programs from scratch is highly desirable.
Certifications:
Mandatory (Offensive Security): Must hold a highly respected, practical penetration testing certification such as:
OSCP (Offensive Security Certified Professional) - Highly Preferred
OSEP, OSWE, or PEN-300.
Alternatives: CEH (Certified Ethical Hacker) or CompTIA PenTest+ (only if accompanied by strong proven practical experience).
Desirable (General/Defensive): CISSP, CISM, or BTL1 (Blue Team Level 1) to complement the offensive skills with governance and defensive knowledge.
Required Skills and Competencies
Technical Skills (Heavy Offensive Focus):
Expert-level proficiency with penetration testing frameworks and tools (e.g., Burp Suite Professional, Metasploit, Cobalt Strike, Nmap, Nessus, SQLmap).
Deep understanding of the OWASP Top 10, SANS Top 25, and advanced exploitation techniques.
Strong scripting and automation skills (Python, Bash, PowerShell) to write custom exploits, automate scanning, and parse logs.
Solid understanding of defensive security, network protocols, and how to configure log aggregation tools (e.g., Splunk, ELK, Wazuh) for a solo analyst.
Soft Skills:
Self-Starter & Time Management: Ability to work independently, prioritize tasks ruthlessly, and manage time effectively without direct supervision.
Technical Translation: Ability to explain complex, highly technical exploitation chains to non-technical financial executives and translate them into business risks.
High Integrity: Unquestionable ethical standards

Submission Guidelines
Qualified applicants are encouraged to submit their CVs with a detailed application letter and contact details, no later than 9-Jul-2026 to below e-mail:
Please clearly indicate “position name/vacancy number in the subject line.
Please do not attach your education and working experience documents.

Submission Email

title: کارمند تکنالوژی کمره های امنیتی، ریاست حیرتان
description:
Role Summary
تأمین، حفظ و مراقبت سیستم‌های تکنالوژی معلوماتی، شبکه‌های کمپیوتری و کمره‌های امنیتی اداره به‌منظور تضمین امنیت اطلاعات، تداوم فعالیت سیستم‌ها، نظارت مؤثر بر ساحات تحت پوشش و فراهم‌سازی خدمات تخنیکی مورد نیاز برای بخش‌های مختلف اداره.

Duties and Responsibilities
· ترتیب پلان کاری ماهوار، ربعوار و سالانه در مطابقت با پلان مدیریت مربوطه جهت رسیدن به اهداف تعیین‌شده اداره.
· نصب، تنظیم و راه‌اندازی کمپیوترها، پرنترها، اسکنرها، تجهیزات شبکه و سایر وسایل تکنالوژی معلوماتی مطابق نیازمندی اداره.
· نصب، تنظیم، عیب‌یابی و حفظ و مراقبت کمره‌های امنیتی، دستگاه‌های ثبت تصاویر و تجهیزات جانبی آن.
· نظارت دوامدار از فعالیت سیستم کمره‌های امنیتی و اتخاذ اقدامات لازم جهت رفع مشکلات تخنیکی و جلوگیری از وقفه در فعالیت آن‌ها.
· ثبت، نگهداری و آرشیف تصاویر و ویدیوهای ثبت‌شده مطابق اصول، طرزالعمل‌ها و رهنمودهای نافذۀ اداره.
· بررسی و تشخیص عیوب شبکه‌های کمپیوتری، تجهیزات مخابراتی و سیستم‌های نظارتی و انجام اقدامات لازم جهت رفع آن‌ها.
· همکاری در نصب، توسعه و حفظ و مراقبت شبکۀ داخلی، اینترنت و سایر سیستم‌های ارتباطی اداره.
· انجام سرویس‌های وقایوی و ترمیمی تجهیزات تکنالوژی معلوماتی و کمره‌های امنیتی به منظور جلوگیری از خرابی‌های احتمالی.
· مدیریت حساب‌های کاربری، دسترسی‌های سیستم و رعایت تدابیر امنیت سایبری در هماهنگی با مسئولین مربوطه.
· تهیه راپورهای تخنیکی در مورد وضعیت تجهیزات، سیستم‌ها، مشکلات موجود و اقدامات انجام‌شده جهت ارائه به مدیر مربوط.
· ارائه همکاری‌های تخنیکی به کارکنان اداره در زمینه استفاده از سیستم‌های کمپیوتری، نرم‌افزارها و تجهیزات تکنالوژی معلوماتی.
· اشتراک در بررسی نیازمندی‌های تخنیکی اداره و ارائه پیشنهادات لازم جهت بهبود سیستم‌های تکنالوژی معلوماتی و امنیتی.
· کنترول و نظارت از ذخیره‌گاه‌های معلوماتی، سرورها و تجهیزات مربوطه جهت تأمین مصئونیت و دسترسی به اطلاعات.
· حفظ و مراقبت اسناد، تجهیزات و وسایل تخنیکی سپرده‌شده مطابق اصول و مقررات اداره.
· ترتیب و ارائه گزارشات ماهوار، ربعوار، سالانه از فعالیت ها و دست آورد ها مدیر مربوطه.
· اجرای سایر وظایف مرتبط که از سوی آمرین ذیصلاح مطابق قوانین، مقررات و اهداف اداره سپرده می‌شود.

Job Requirements
· داشتن سند تحصیلی حداقل فوق بکلوریا در رشته‌های تکنالوژی معلوماتی، کمپیوتر ساینس یا سایر رشته‌های مرتبط به وظیفه.
· داشتن حداقل ۲ سال تجریه کاری مرتبط به وظیفه- حایز سند تحصیلی لیسانس از این حکم مستثنی می باشد.

title: Graphic Designer
description:
About Afghan Institute of Learning (AIL)
The Afghan Institute of Learning (AIL) is a non-governmental and non-profit national NGO that was founded in 1995 by Dr. Sakena Yacoobi to provide education, training, and health services to vulnerable Afghans.
The Afghan Institute of Learning (AIL) believes in a community-based, tailored, holistic approach that provides access to health care and education.
Currently, across 11 provinces, AIL runs 44 Learning Centers, 6 health hospitals and health clinics, and 14 village-based Community Health Worker posts.

Job Descriptions
The successful candidate is responsible for creating high-quality visual materials that support the organization's publications, communications, branding, and outreach activities. The selected candidate will produce creative and professional designs for both print and digital media while ensuring consistency with the organization's visual identity and publishing standards.
Key Responsibilities
Design and professionally lay out books, magazines, reports, and other print and digital publications.
Design book covers, magazine covers, and other publishing materials.
Prepare print-ready files in accordance with professional printing and publishing standards.
Design banners, posters, brochures, standees, billboards, and other printed and digital promotional materials.
Collaborate with the Publications Department to enhance the visual quality of the organization's publications.

Job Requirements
Minimum of three (3) years of proven experience in graphic design, particularly in book, magazine, report, and publication layout.
Strong knowledge of typography, page layout, composition, color management, and print production processes.
Experience in preparing print-ready files according to professional printing standards.
Ability to design creative and visually appealing materials for both print and digital platforms.
Excellent attention to detail, creativity, and organizational skills.
Ability to manage multiple projects simultaneously and meet deadlines.
Strong communication and teamwork skills, with the ability to collaborate effectively across departments.
Strong communication and teamwork skills, with the ability to collaborate effectively across departments.
A relevant portfolio demonstrating previous design work is required and must be presented during the interview.

Submission Guidelines
Interested candidates who meet the above requirements are invited to submit their Curriculum Vitae (CV) along with a maximum of three (3) portfolio samples . Please clearly mention the Job Vacancy (AILGR26) in the subject line of your email.
Applications must be sent no later than Saturday, 11 July 2026 to the following email address: ailjob.hr24@gmail.com
Note:
This position is open only to qualified Graphic Design professionals with demonstrated full proficiency in the three software applications mentioned above. Candidates who do not meet the required qualifications are respectfully advised not to apply. Selection will be based primarily on the quality of the portfolio, relevant professional experience, creativity, and overall technical competence of the applicant.

Submission Email
ailjob.hr24@gmail.com
Apply

title: Senior Backend Java Developer
description:
Role Summary
The Senior Backend Java Developer at AurumPay is responsible for designing, building, and launching scalable backend services, FinTech solutions, and API integrations. This role connects AurumPay’s core systems with third-party services such as mobile operators, e-money providers, and digital wallets, focusing on secure, high-performance server-side logic.Key Responsibilities:

Duties and Responsibilities
1. Backend Development & Innovation
• Lead backend development for FinTech projects including digital wallets, payment engines, and automation tools.
• Propose and prototype new features to improve system performance and reliability.
• Ensure continuous development and enhancement of the existing AurumPay Mobile Money system backend.
2. Software Quality & Database Management
• Oversee backend development using Java, Spring Boot, and related libraries (Hibernate, Spring Security).
• Ensure all services meet security, performance, and compliance standards.
• Design and optimize Oracle databases; write complex SQL queries and manage database migrations.
3. API & Third-Party Integrations
• Build and support integrations using REST, SOAP, ISO 8583, and other industry-standard protocols.
• Integrate with mobile operators, digital wallets, EMIs, payment switches, and gateways.
4. System Design & Team Leadership
• Design scalable backend architectures and integration plans based on business needs.
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams to build resilient solutions.
• Provide technical guidance, code reviews, and mentorship to junior developers.
• Promote agile methodologies and CI/CD practices.

Job Requirements
Mandatory:
• Strong expertise in Java and Spring Boot (Spring MVC, Spring Data, Spring Security).
• Proven experience building REST/SOAP APIs and integrations using ISO 8583 and other industry protocols.
• Deep understanding of microservices architecture and full SDLC.
• Hands-on experience integrating with wallets, telecom operators, EMIs, or financial switches.
• Strong proficiency with Oracle databases (complex queries, indexing, performance tuning).
• Experience deploying applications on Oracle WebLogic Server or similar Java EE containers.
• Proficient with GitHub/GitLab and CI/CD pipelines.
• 5+ years of backend Java development experience in FinTech, payments, or technical integrations.
• Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, IT, or related field (Master’s is a plus).

Submission Guidelines
Interested candidates should submit their CV to following Email Address.
( jobs@aurumaf.com)

title: 2. Female Trainer – Digital Marketing, Social Media, Photography and Branding
description:
About ACE/PPC
Premium Performance Consulting (PPC) is a specialized Afghan consulting firm providing monitoring, evaluation, third-party monitoring (TPM), independent assessments, verification services, research, data management, and quality assurance solutions for development and humanitarian programs across Afghanistan. PPC has supported a wide range of assignments for UN agencies, international organizations, NGOs, and government institutions, delivering evidence-based insights, performance measurement, beneficiary verification, and accountability services that strengthen program effectiveness and decision-making.
PPC serves as a strategic domain partner within the Afghanistan Center for Excellence (ACE) Ecosystem . Established in 2012, ACE is a leading Afghan consulting and development services organization with nationwide operations and regional offices across Afghanistan. ACE specializes in private sector development, business development services (BDS), value chain development, livelihoods, workforce development, capacity building, economic inclusion, research, and institutional strengthening, supporting governments, development partners, and private sector actors in achieving sustainable development outcomes.
The advertised position is with the Afghanistan Center for Excellence (ACE) and will contribute to ACE's portfolio of consulting and development assignments. Through the ACE Ecosystem partnership model, the position will benefit from the complementary expertise of PPC and other ecosystem partners, combining ACE's programmatic leadership and technical delivery capacity with PPC's strengths in monitoring, evaluation, verification, and quality assurance to deliver high-quality, evidence-driven development solutions across Afghanistan.
Interested applicants should submit:
Updated CV
Cover letter clearly mentioning the trainer position(s) applied for
Relevant sample training materials, portfolio, or evidence of similar assignments, if available
Contact details of two professional references

Job Descriptions
Afghanistan Center for Excellence (ACE), through the ACE/PPC Ecosystem, is implements capacity-building projects aimed at strengthening women-owned and women-led businesses in Afghanistan. The projects provide practical training and follow-up mentoring/coaching support to women entrepreneurs in key business development areas, including business registration, legal compliance, taxation, digital marketing, procurement readiness, access to finance, and business growth.
ACE/PPC Ecosystem is seeking qualified and experienced female trainers for the following thematic areas.
Purpose of the Position: The Trainer will deliver practical training and mentoring to women-owned and women-led businesses on digital marketing, social media use, product photography, branding, content development, and basic digital marketing planning.

Job Requirements
Main Training and Mentoring Areas
· Use of social media platforms for small business promotion.
· Basic digital tools for business visibility and customer engagement.
· Product photography using available/simple tools.
· Branding, messaging, and content development for women-owned businesses.
· Preparation of simple digital marketing plans and posting schedules.
Key Responsibilities
· Develop, review, and adapt training materials related to digital marketing, social media, photography, and branding.
· Prepare session plans, agendas, exercises, live demonstrations, and practical examples.
· Deliver interactive and practical training sessions to women entrepreneurs.
· Facilitate hands-on exercises on social media pages, content design, product photos, branding, and customer engagement.
· Conduct pre- and post-training assessments, where required.
· Provide practical templates and tools, including content calendars, simple brand guides, caption samples, and digital marketing plan templates.
· Provide follow-up mentoring/coaching to selected participants on improving their online presence and business visibility.
· Support participants in applying digital marketing practices to their own products and services.
· Document participant progress, key challenges, and success stories, where applicable.
· Coordinate with ACE/PPC Ecosystem project staff on logistics, attendance, documentation, and reporting.
· Prepare brief training and mentoring reports, including observations, participant feedback, challenges, and recommendations.
· Ensure all sessions are respectful, inclusive, culturally appropriate, and gender-sensitive.
Expected Deliverables
· Training agenda and session plan.
· Final/adapted training materials on digital marketing, social media, photography, and branding.
· Practical templates/tools, such as digital marketing plan, content calendar, branding checklist, and product photography checklist.
· Pre- and post-test tools, where required.
· Participant attendance lists.
· Training completion report.
· Mentoring/coaching session notes and participant progress updates.
· Photos/videos and other training evidence, as required.
Required Qualifications and Experience
· Bachelor’s degree in Marketing, Communications, ICT, Business Administration, Media, Design, Development Studies, or another relevant field. Master’s degree is preferred.
· Minimum 3–5 years of relevant experience in digital marketing, social media management, branding, photography, business development, entrepreneurship support, or MSME mentoring/coaching.
· Proven experience delivering training and/or coaching to women entrepreneurs, MSMEs, private sector actors, or business groups.
· Strong practical knowledge of social media platforms, digital tools, content development, product photography, and small business branding.
· Excellent facilitation, presentation, communication, and interpersonal skills.
· Fluency in Dari and/or Pashto is required; working knowledge of English is an advantage.
· Ability to travel to target provinces, if required.
· Previous experience with UN agencies, NGOs, consulting firms, or donor-funded projects is an advantage.

Submission Guidelines
Interested and qualified female candidates are invited to submit their applications to:
Email: business@pre-performance.com
Subject Line: Application – Female Trainer / [Mention Training Area]
Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted for written test, technical assessment, or interview.

Submission Email
business@pre-performance.com
Apply

title: Tech Lead / Full-Stack Architect.
category: Information Technology, Management, Supply Chain, Communication, Accounting, IT
description:
About Etimad Maihan group
Etimad Maihan Group is an Afghan-owned construction and engineering company with an established presence across Afghanistan, employing a team of 20 to 50 professionals across project management, engineering, civil works, and operations. Founded and led by Afghan nationals, the company has built its reputation through the successful delivery of residential, commercial, and infrastructure construction projects, working in compliance with Afghan Ministry of Urban Development and Housing standards and international quality benchmarks.
With a strong foundation in the Afghan construction sector, Etimad Maihan Group is now investing in its next strategic phase: the development of BuildPrice NSW, a technology platform being launched in Australia. BuildPrice NSW applies artificial intelligence to automate construction cost estimation — enabling clients to upload architectural drawings and receive an instant, itemised Bill of Quantities priced at current market rates. This platform is the first of its kind in the Australian construction market and represents Etimad Maihan Group's expansion from physical construction into construction technology.
The development team for BuildPrice NSW will be based in Afghanistan, working under the direct leadership of the Group's Director and reporting to the Australian operation. This arrangement reflects the Group's commitment to creating skilled technology employment in Afghanistan while delivering an internationally competitive product. Etimad Maihan Group offers its technology team members direct exposure to the Australian construction market, hands-on experience with current AI technologies including the Anthropic Claude API, and a genuine opportunity to grow with a company at the beginning of its international journey.
The Tech Lead / Full-Stack Architect role is the founding technical position within this division and represents a significant career opportunity for a highly qualified Afghan software engineer.
Mandatory
• Minimum 5 years of professional full-stack software development experience, with at least 2 years in a senior or lead capacity.
• Bachelor's degree (B.Sc.) in Computer Science, Software Engineering, Information Technology, or a closely related technical discipline.
• Demonstrable experience having led or co-led the full build of a production web application — from architecture through to deployment. Portfolio or GitHub evidence required.
• Strong command of both frontend (React ecosystem) and backend (Node.js or Python) development — not a specialist in one at the expense of the other.
• Proven ability to write clean, documented, maintainable code that other developers can work with and extend.
• Professional proficiency in English — written and spoken — sufficient to communicate requirements, documentation, and technical decisions clearly with an Australian director.
Preferred
• 5+ years of experience (beyond the minimum) with increasing scope and seniority.
• Prior experience as a founding engineer or CTO equivalent at a startup or early-stage company.
• Demonstrable experience mentoring junior developers and conducting systematic code reviews.
• Experience working in an ISO 27001, SOC 2, or similar security-conscious engineering environment.

Job Descriptions
KEY RESPONSIBILITIES:
1. System Architecture & Technical Leadership
• Design and own the complete system architecture for all three platform components: customer portal, backend API, and internal ERP.
• Define technology standards, coding conventions, branching strategy, code review protocols, and deployment pipelines that all team members must follow.
• Produce and maintain architecture decision records (ADRs) for every major technical decision, including database schema design, API structure, third-party integrations, and AI pipeline design.
• Evaluate and select all third-party libraries, frameworks, SaaS tools, and cloud services — with rationale documented for each selection.
• Ensure all architectural decisions account for Australian data sovereignty, GDPR-adjacent obligations, and NCC/ABSA compliance where applicable.
2. Customer Portal (Frontend)
• Build and maintain the customer-facing web application using React 18+ and Next.js 14+ (App Router).
• Implement the drawing upload flow (PDF intake), real-time BoQ display, itemised pricing breakdown UI, scope adjustment interface, and job acceptance workflow.
• Ensure full mobile responsiveness, accessibility (WCAG 2.1 AA), and sub-3-second page load on Australian connections.
• Build the user authentication system (email/password + Google OAuth), account management, notification system, and document download (BoQ PDF export).
• Integrate the Stripe payment gateway for deposit collection upon job acceptance.
3. Backend API
• Design and implement a RESTful (and where appropriate, GraphQL) API layer using Node.js (Express or Fastify) or Python (FastAPI or Django REST Framework).
• Design the PostgreSQL database schema covering: users, projects, BoQ line items, materials, trade rates, job lifecycle, contractors, invoicing, and audit logs.
• Build the pricing engine — the core module that takes extracted BoQ line items and applies current NSW market rates, supplier pricing, and trade margin rules to produce the final quoted price.
• Implement Redis caching for high-frequency pricing lookups and session management.
• Build the webhook and event pipeline for job status updates, contractor notifications, payment confirmations, and reporting.
• Implement row-level security and role-based access control (RBAC) covering: customer, operations staff, contractor, admin, and super-admin roles.
4. AI / BoQ Automation Engine
• Design and implement the end-to-end PDF drawing ingestion pipeline — from raw PDF upload to structured BoQ output.
• Integrate the Claude API (Anthropic) for intelligent extraction of room schedules, finishes schedules, fixture schedules, and specification data from architectural drawing sets.
• Build the structured data normalisation layer that converts AI-extracted raw text into validated, schema-conformant BoQ line items.
• Implement confidence scoring, exception flagging, and human review workflows for AI outputs that fall below acceptable confidence thresholds.
• Build the feedback loop system — where corrections made by the operations team are used to continuously improve extraction accuracy over time.
• Optimise the pipeline for speed: target under 3 minutes from drawing upload to delivered BoQ for a standard residential drawing set.
5. Internal ERP (Operations Back-Office)
• Design and build the internal ERP used by the BuildPrice NSW operations team for day-to-day management of jobs, pricing, contractors, and reporting.
• Key ERP modules to deliver: Job Dashboard (all active jobs and their status), Pricing Database Manager (trade rates, material costs, supplier pricing), Contractor Management (profiles, licences, availability, performance ratings), BoQ Review & Override Interface, Financial Reporting (invoicing, GST, margin tracking), and Quality Control checklists.
• Build role-specific dashboards for: operations manager, pricing analyst, contractor coordinator, and executive/founder views.
6. Cloud Infrastructure & DevOps
• Set up and maintain the full AWS infrastructure on ap-southeast-2 (Sydney): EC2 or ECS for compute, RDS PostgreSQL for the primary database, ElastiCache Redis, S3 for drawing storage, CloudFront CDN, Route 53 DNS, ACM for SSL, and Secrets Manager for credentials.
• Build and maintain CI/CD pipelines using GitHub Actions: automated testing, linting, build, staging deployment, and production deployment with rollback capability.
• Implement monitoring and alerting using CloudWatch and/or Datadog: uptime monitoring, performance metrics, error alerting, and cost monitoring.
• Implement automated backups, disaster recovery procedures, and document RPO/RTO targets.
7. Team Leadership
• Once the broader Phase 1 team is assembled, lead and mentor 6 additional specialists: Frontend Developer, Backend Developer, AI/BoQ Engineer, QA/Test Engineer, DevOps Engineer, and Project Manager.
• Conduct weekly technical stand-ups (10:00 AM Kabul time.), code reviews, sprint planning, and retrospectives.
• Define and enforce code quality standards, peer review requirements, and testing coverage targets across all team members.
• Be the primary technical liaison between the development team and the Founder — translating business requirements into technical specifications, and technical constraints into business impact.

Job Requirements
REQUIRED TECHNICAL SKILLS — MANDATORY
Candidates must demonstrate strong hands-on experience across all of the following. Applications without evidence of these skills will not be considered.
Frontend
React 18+
Next.js 14+ (App Router)
TypeScript
Tailwind CSS
REST API integration
State management (Zustand / Redux)
Responsive design
Web accessibility (WCAG)
PDF rendering in browser
Backend & Database
Node.js (Express / Fastify)
Python (FastAPI / Django)
PostgreSQL (advanced)
Database schema design
REST API design
JWT / OAuth2 / session auth
Redis (caching & queues)
File upload & storage (S3)
Background job queues
AI / Automation
Claude API / OpenAI API
PDF text extraction
Prompt engineering
Structured output (JSON schema)
Python data pipelines
pandas / openpyxl
Document parsing (PyMuPDF / pdfplumber)
Data validation & normalisation
Error handling & fallback logic
Cloud & DevOps
AWS (EC2 / RDS / S3 / CloudFront)
AWS (Route53 / ACM / IAM / VPC)
Docker & Docker Compose
GitHub Actions (CI/CD)
Linux / Bash scripting
Nginx / ALB load balancing
CloudWatch monitoring
Environment & secrets management
Terraform or CloudFormation
General Engineering
Git (branching & code review)
Agile / Scrum methodology
Unit & integration testing
Security best practices (OWASP)
API documentation (OpenAPI/Swagger)
Performance optimisation

Submission Guidelines

description:
About Zoom Byte IT Services
Zoom Byte is a leading IT training and services company based in Kabul, dedicated to empowering individuals with in-demand technology skills. As a Cisco Networking Academy and authorized Pearson VUE test center, Zoom Byte provides internationally recognized certifications and hands-on training to prepare students for global career opportunities. Alongside training, the company delivers professional IT solutions to businesses, contributing to the growth of Afghanistan’s digital ecosystem.

Job Descriptions
Zoom Byte is seeking a motivated and results-oriented Digital Marketing Manager to lead, plan, execute, and optimize digital marketing strategies across multiple platforms. The ideal candidate will play a key role in strengthening Zoom Byte’s online presence, promoting educational programs, managing campaigns, and driving engagement, leads, and conversions. This position requires strategic thinking, creativity, analytical skills, and close collaboration with internal teams.

Job Requirements
ü Develop, lead, and optimize digital marketing strategies across social media, Google Ads, email marketing, and other digital channels.
ü Manage and grow Zoom Byte’s presence on social media platforms.
ü Monitor, analyze, and report on campaign performance using analytics tools.

ü Create, coordinate, and oversee digital content aligned with Zoom Byte’s brand and educational goals.

ü comprehension skills and Ability to communicate clearly and effectively in Pashto for

ü Creative and Professional Environment: Work in a dynamic and supportive space that encourages creativity and innovation in digital marketing.

ü Hands-on Experience with Real Projects: Work on campaigns, social media, online advertising, and data analytics to gain practical experience.

title: Graphic Designer & Digital Media Specialist
description:
About Ghyasi Group of companies
Ghyasi Group of Companies is a leading Afghan multi-sector conglomerate operating across logistics, pharmaceuticals, construction, trading, and humanitarian sectors. Established with a vision of excellence and sustainable growth, Ghyasi Group is committed to building strong internal systems and a professional corporate identity that reflects its national and international standing.

Job Descriptions
Ghyasi Group of Companies is seeking a creative and motivated Graphic Designer & Digital Media Specialist to join its Kabul office. The successful candidate will be responsible for designing high-quality marketing and corporate materials, producing professional photos and videos, managing the company’s social media platforms, and strengthening the organization’s visual identity across all business sectors. The ideal candidate should have strong graphic design skills, experience in digital media and content creation, and the ability to manage multiple creative projects in a professional environment.
Key Responsibilities
Graphic Design
• Design professional materials including ID cards, letterheads, banners, brochures, and company profiles
• Develop marketing materials for print and digital use across all Ghyasi Group subsidiaries
• Ensure all designs are aligned with Ghyasi Group’s brand identity and visual standards
• Prepare print-ready files and coordinate with printing vendors as needed
Video & Photo Production
• Plan, shoot, and edit professional corporate videos, promotional clips, and event coverage
• Conduct in-house photography for staff, facilities, products, and company events
• Edit and retouch photos for both digital and print use
• Maintain an organized archive of all media assets
Digital & Social Media
• Manage and grow Ghyasi Group’s presence on Facebook, Instagram, and other platforms
• Create and schedule engaging content (posts, reels, stories) on a regular basis
• Run and manage paid advertising and boost campaigns on social media platforms
• Monitor performance analytics and report on reach, engagement, and campaign results
• Gradually take on broader marketing responsibilities as the role evolves

Job Requirements
Education
• Bachelor’s degree in Graphic Design, Visual Communication, Fine Arts, or a related field
• Relevant certifications or a strong portfolio may substitute for formal degree
Experience
• Minimum 2–4 years of professional experience in graphic design and/or digital media
• Demonstrated experience in social media management and content creation
Technical Skills — Required
• Adobe Photoshop — advanced level
• Adobe Illustrator or InDesign — advanced level
• Adobe Premiere Pro or similar video editing software
• Adobe After Effects (motion graphics) — preferred
• Photography skills with DSLR or mirrorless camera
• Social media advertising — Facebook Ads Manager, Instagram Boost
• Familiarity with AI.

Submission Guidelines

title: Full-Stack Web Developer (Night Shift)
salary: As per HPL salary scale (negotiable based on experience)
description:
About HPL Afghanistan
HPL is an Afghan company providing services and operational support to international organizations and private clients. Our technology team builds and maintains modern web applications and data platforms that support our operations across the organization.

Job Descriptions
HPL is hiring experienced Full-Stack Web Developers to design, build, and maintain modern web applications and data platforms that support our international operations. This is a night shift position, scheduled to overlap with US time zone business hours. We are looking for engineers with more than 5 years of professional experience who take ownership of features from start to finish, write clean and tested code, and collaborate well within a small, fast moving team.
Key Responsibilities:
Build and maintain web applications with React, Next.js, and TypeScript
Develop backend services and REST APIs with Node.js and Python
Design, query, and optimize PostgreSQL databases
Integrate third party APIs and build data pipelines
Deploy and maintain applications on cloud platforms such as Vercel or AWS
Write clean, well documented, and tested code, and take part in code reviews
Use Git for version control and collaborate within the team

Job Requirements
Required Qualifications:
More than 5 years of professional full stack web development experience
Bachelor degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or a related field
Strong proficiency in JavaScript and TypeScript
Experience with React, Node.js, and Python
Working knowledge of SQL and PostgreSQL
Proficiency with Git and collaborative workflows
Good written and spoken English
Available to work the night shift
Preferred Skills:
Next.js (App Router) and server side rendering
Cloud experience with Vercel or AWS
Search engines such as Typesense or Elasticsearch
Docker, CI/CD, and automated testing

Submission Guidelines
To apply, please complete the HPL Job Application Form: HPL JOB APPLICATION FORM
Important Notes:
Clearly state your current address and the job location you are applying for in both your CV and the application form. Applications missing this information will not be accepted.
Applications received after the closing date will not be considered.
Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.
HPL does not charge any fee at any stage of the recruitment process. Applying is completely free.
Only the HR department will contact applicants. HPL is not responsible for announcements on other websites or social media; only information shared through official HPL channels is valid.
For any issues during the application process, please contact us at www.hpl.af/contacts.

title: Senior Full-Stack Developer (.NET / React)
description:
About Nasry Tech LLC
NasryTech is a US-based software company (registered in Washington State) building a modern construction
management platform that helps contractors manage leads, estimates, projects, communications, documents,
invoicing, and payments — all from one platform. We are an early-stage, founder-led startup building scalable,
user-friendly software for contractors and construction businesses.
Website: www.nasrytech.com

Job Description
Engagement Type: Independent Contractor · Fully Remote · Long-term
About the Role
We are seeking a Senior Full-Stack Developer to join our remote engineering team as an early technical hire.
You will build features end-to-end — from database to user interface — help shape the architecture of our
platform, and guide a small team of developers as we grow. This is a long-term, fully remote, independent
contractor engagement with real ownership of your work and the stability of an ongoing role.
The position is home-based and open to applicants worldwide.
What We Offer
• Competitive pay and a stable, long-term engagement.
• Fully remote work.
• Direct collaboration with the founder and genuine ownership of your work.
• The chance to grow with an early-stage product and shape its architecture.

Job Requirements
Duties & Responsibilities
• Design, build, and maintain features across the full stack, from database to UI.
• Develop secure, scalable backend APIs and services in C# / .NET, following Clean Architecture principles
(CQRS, dependency injection, domain-driven design).
• Build responsive, high-quality web applications using React and TypeScript.
• Apply engineering best practices: clean code, testing, and sustainable system design.
• Work closely with the founder and team to plan, prioritize, and deliver features.
• Lead and mentor a small team of developers — providing technical guidance, reviewing code, and helping
the team deliver high-quality software.
Required Qualifications (Must Have)

title: General Manager of Information Technology (GM-IT)
description:
About Kandahar Cement Company
Kandahar Cement Factory is a privately owned industrial enterprise dedicated to producing high-quality cement that supports Afghanistan's infrastructure, construction, and economic development. With a strong commitment to quality, operational excellence, and sustainability, the factory applies modern manufacturing practices and effective financial and operational management while ensuring compliance with applicable laws and industry standards.
As an important contributor to Afghanistan's industrial sector, Kandahar Cement Factory is committed to creating employment opportunities, supporting private sector growth, and contributing to the country's long-term economic development. Through continuous improvement, innovation, and responsible business practices, the factory strives to meet the evolving needs of the construction industry while delivering lasting value to its customers, employees, and stakeholders.

Job Descriptions
Support the factory's production processes by ensuring the reliability, stability, and efficient operation of the Information Technology (IT) infrastructure. Monitor, identify, troubleshoot, and resolve technical issues in a timely manner to ensure uninterrupted operations and provide effective IT support across all factory departments.
Ensure the security of the organization's information systems, databases, and critical information assets by designing, implementing, and continuously monitoring effective security controls. Safeguard the confidentiality, integrity, and availability of organizational data in accordance with established cybersecurity standards, industry best practices, and the organization's information security policies.
Lead digital transformation initiatives by leveraging Information Technology (IT) solutions to automate and optimize administrative and operational processes, improve organizational efficiency and productivity, streamline workflows, and support data-driven decision-making across the organization.
Develop, implement, and oversee comprehensive Information Technology (IT) policies, standards, and operating procedures to ensure the effective governance, monitoring, security, and optimal utilization of IT resources across all functional areas of the factory, while supporting operational efficiency, regulatory compliance, and organizational objectives.
Key Responsibilities :
Plan, design, implement, and manage the organization's Information Technology (IT) infrastructure, including enterprise networks, servers, telecommunications systems, and related technologies, to ensure high availability, reliability, scalability, security, and optimal performance in support of organizational operations and strategic objectives.
Ensure the continuous availability, stability, and security of enterprise networks, servers, databases, cloud environments, and cybersecurity infrastructure by implementing proactive monitoring, preventive maintenance, regular data backup and recovery procedures, and comprehensive information security controls to safeguard organizational data and ensure business continuity.
Oversee the management of on-premises data centers and cloud services, continuously monitor the performance, availability, and reliability of IT systems, and implement continuous improvement initiatives to enhance operational efficiency, system resilience, scalability, and long-term sustainability.
Develop, manage, and monitor the Information Technology (IT) budget while conducting strategic forecasting and planning for future technical, operational, and infrastructure requirements to ensure the cost-effective allocation of resources and alignment with the organization's long-term business objectives.
Manage and strengthen the security of information systems and databases by designing, implementing, and continuously monitoring robust security controls that protect the confidentiality, integrity, and availability of organizational information assets, ensuring compliance with cybersecurity standards, regulatory requirements, and industry best practices.
Develop, implement, and continuously enhance cybersecurity policies, standards, and procedures in alignment with internationally recognized frameworks, including ISO/IEC 27001, the NIST Cybersecurity Framework, and other relevant best practices; administer identity and access management (IAM) controls through the effective assignment and monitoring of user access privileges; and ensure the confidentiality, integrity, and availability of sensitive organizational information through the implementation of comprehensive security governance, risk management, and data protection measures.
Conduct comprehensive cybersecurity risk assessments and implement effective risk management strategies; develop and execute incident prevention, detection, response, and recovery plans to address cybersecurity threats and security incidents; and design and deliver ongoing cybersecurity awareness and training programs to promote security best practices and strengthen the organization's overall security culture among Information Technology (IT) users and employees.
Lead the digital transformation of organizational and administrative processes by designing and implementing modern digital technologies and enterprise information systems that automate business operations, optimize information and data management, improve workflow efficiency, and enhance the quality, accessibility, and effectiveness of organizational service delivery.
Coordinate and collaborate closely with production, administrative, and executive departments to ensure the effective utilization of Information Technology (IT) solutions, support business process optimization, and drive continuous improvement of core operational workflows across the organization.
Establish and maintain effective professional working relationships across organizational units and ensure the timely, accurate, and structured reporting of Information Technology (IT) activities, system performance, and technological developments to relevant stakeholders, supporting informed decision-making and organizational transparency.
Provide regular, structured, and timely reports to the Chief Executive Officer (CEO) regarding Information Technology (IT) activities, system performance, and strategic initiatives, while ensuring continuous coordination and effective collaboration with all relevant organizational units to support operational alignment, efficiency, and informed executive decision-making.
Liaise and coordinate with Internet Service Providers (ISPs) and oversee the design, negotiation, execution, and management of service-level agreements (SLAs) and contractual arrangements to ensure optimal service performance, quality assurance, reliability, and continuity of internet and communication services in alignment with organizational requirements.

Job Requirements
Education: A Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, or closely related disciplines is required. Candidates possessing a Master’s degree in relevant fields will be considered an asset and given priority during the selection and recruitment process.
Professional Experience: A minimum of 5–10 years of progressive professional experience in the Information Technology (IT) sector, with demonstrated capacity in leading and managing technical teams, as well as a proven track record of planning, executing, and overseeing large-scale IT projects within reputable public, private, or non-governmental organizations, including both profit and non-profit sectors.
Comprehensive expertise in Information Technology (IT) hardware and software systems, with demonstrated ability to effectively operate, configure, manage, and support related technologies and enterprise systems to ensure optimal performance, reliability, and operational efficiency.
Languages: Full professional proficiency in Pashto, Dari, and English, including strong written and verbal communication skills in all three languages to support effective organizational communication and reporting.

Application Submission Requirements

An updated Curriculum Vitae (CV) detailing the applicant's complete employment history and relevant work experience.
Copies of all educational qualifications and professional certificates.
A copy of the applicant's Tazkira.
The names and contact details of at least two professional references from previous employers.

We work closely with leading telecom operators, as well as international NGOs, development partners, and humanitarian organizations, and various United Nations agencies. Our projects span media production, digital solutions, communication campaigns, and technology-driven services, contributing to impactful and sustainable initiatives nationwide.
At YRMPT, we value professionalism, creativity, innovation, and teamwork. We provide a dynamic working environment that encourages learning, skill development, and growth, while offering opportunities to work on high-impact projects with reputable local and international partners.
For more information about our company, services, and portfolio, please visit www.yrmpt.com .

Job Descriptions

The Motion Graphic Designer will be responsible for designing and producing high-quality motion graphics, animations, video edits, and visual content for digital and broadcast platforms. The successful candidate will collaborate with the creative and production teams to transform concepts into compelling visual stories while maintaining high creative and technical standards.

Ensure all deliverables meet quality standards and project deadlines.

Prepare artwork for digital and print production.
Collaboration & Project Coordination

category: IT - Software, Information Technology, Linux Administration
description:
Role Summary
The System Admin Officer is critically responsible for the end-to-end administration, security, optimization, and absolute continuous availability of Setaragan Mutahed’s – Star Pay core server architecture, Microsoft Hyper-V virtualization fabrics, and database systems. This high accountability role ensures zero-downtime operations for our nationwide transactional platforms, B2C mobile applications, and multi-operator network integrations.

Duties and Responsibilities
Ø Administer servers and core services (AD/DNS/DHCP where applicable), ensuring availability and secure configuration.
Ø Implement patch management, vulnerability remediation, and baseline hardening in line with security standards.
Ø Manage backups (daily/weekly/monthly), verify backup success, and perform periodic restore testing.
Ø Monitor system performance and capacity (CPU, RAM, storage), plan upgrades, and prevent outages.
Ø Support network and firewall teams with required system-side configurations for services, ports, and integrations.
Ø Manage privileged access, service accounts, and secrets handling using approved processes.
Ø Maintain system documentation: architecture diagrams, build documents, runbooks, and change records.
Ø Support DR/BCP readiness, including replication, standby systems, and recovery procedures.
Ø Perform monthly backup restore drills to verify recoverability of critical systems and databases, document results, and report any gaps for corrective action.
Ø Create, configure, and manage Virtual Machines (VMs) on Microsoft Hyper-V, including VM provisioning, resource allocation (CPU/RAM/storage), templates, snapshots/checkpoints (as per policy), and performance monitoring.
Ø Maintain Hyper-V host health and capacity, including storage management, patching coordination, and ensuring VM availability.
Ø Implement and maintain VM backup and recovery for Hyper-V workloads, aligned with the backup policy and monthly restore drills.

Job Requirements
Ø Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science/IT or equivalent practical experience.
Ø 3+ years of hands-on system administration experience (Windows Server and/or Linux).
Ø Experience in backup/restore, patching, and server security hardening.
Ø Technical Skills
Ø Windows Server administration (AD/GPO, IIS) and/or Linux administration.
Ø Virtualization (VMware/Hyper-V) and storage concepts; backup solutions.
Ø Log review and troubleshooting; scripting basics (PowerShell/Bash) is an advantage.
Ø Understanding of security controls (least privilege, MFA, audit logs).
Ø Microsoft Hyper-V administration, VM lifecycle management, virtual networking (vSwitch/VLAN), and basic troubleshooting.
Ø Soft Skills & Behavioral Competencies
Ø Strong troubleshooting and analytical skills.
Ø Process-driven mindset; careful change execution with rollback planning.
Ø Good communication and documentation skills.
Ø Key Deliverables / KPIs
Ø Patch compliance and vulnerability closure within agreed timelines.
Ø Backup success rate and restore-test success rate.
Ø Server uptime and reduction of unplanned downtime.
Ø Quality of documentation and change records.
Ø Working Relationships
Ø Internal: IT Manager, NOC, Helpdesk, Development team, Compliance/Audit.
Ø External: Hosting/data center, backup/security vendors, software vendors (as needed).
Ø Confidentiality & Compliance
Ø The role holder must protect confidential information, follow approved access controls, and comply with the Company’s Information Security policies, audit requirements, and applicable regulations. Any exceptions must be approved through the formal change and risk-acceptance process.

title: System/ Customer Support Officer
description:
Role Summary
The System/Customer Support Officer is responsible for 24/7 monitoring of UA Telecom’s wireless network devices, recording and resolving customer complaints and technical incidents through the support lifecycle, and performing multi-level troubleshooting across network and customer systems to ensure service continuity, SLA compliance, and uninterrupted service delivery.

Duties and Responsibilities
1. Record and manage customer complaint history in the designated system, ensuring continuous follow-up until full resolution.
2. Log and maintain records of site failures, power issues, and network downtime for SLA tracking and reconciliation.
3. Monitor network performance tools (Red EMCO) for microwave and InfiNet devices, including ping latency and interference analysis, and support corrective actions to ensure timely issue resolution.
4. Monitor Air Control Alerting systems for network devices including device online/offline status, pole movement alerts, interference issues, hotspot connectivity failures, CCQ degradation, and bitrate issues, and take corrective or escalated action as required.
5. Maintain overall health monitoring of network devices in accordance with standard points.
6. Provide second-line and limited third-line technical support for customer and network-related issues.
7. Troubleshoot and resolve issues related to BTS sites, PTP links, wireless sectors, switches, routers, and other network infrastructure.
8. Perform troubleshooting and configuration support for network switches, including implementation of advanced features when required.
9. Resolve customer-side issues related to CPE (Customer Premises Equipment) and LAN networks using remote access tools.
10. Support firmware and IOS/software upgrades for wireless and network devices based on vendor updates and operational requirements.
11. Identify, analyze, and resolve customer connectivity issues remotely using diagnostic and remote support tools.
12. Generate and share weekly reports of inactive/non-usage customers with Sales, CRM, and Collections teams for further action.
13. Escalate bandwidth and capacity-related issues to CRM and Sales teams for review and adjustment of customer packages.
14. Maintain accurate records of customer installations in the designated database, including customer name, connected base station details, router model, bandwidth allocation (day/night), contact details (POC), and technical configuration information.
15. Record and manage demo customers’ complaints and ensure follow-up until resolution in the designated system.
16. Maintain hotspot user records in centralized databases, including credentials, package details, validity, and access point information.
17. Update internal communication groups (e.g., WhatsApp groups) for new installations, link termination, and network incident notifications, and inform customers of urgent technical issues when required.
18. Coordinate and arrange field teams for on-site visits when remote troubleshooting is not sufficient.
19. Maintain complete documentation of system monitoring events, incidents, and customer complaints in designated databases.
20. Respond to all customer inquiries, calls, emails, and complaints in a professional and timely manner.
21. Communicate planned and unplanned maintenance activities, outages, and service issues to customers via email, phone, or messaging platforms, ensuring confirmation and status updates.
22. Schedule and communicate maintenance activities for base stations, ensuring customers are notified at least 48 hours in advance.
23. Prepare shift-wise reports detailing completed tasks, ongoing incidents, and pending issues.
24. Ensure proper handover of all active tickets, incidents, and operational tasks to the next shift for continuity of service.

Job Requirements
Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science (BCS).
Minimum 3 years of hands-on experience in IT/network operations, preferably in ISP or telecom environments.
Strong communication skills with ability to interact effectively with customers and internal teams.
Fluency in Dari, Pashto, and English (spoken and written).
Working knowledge of Linux operating systems and programming/scripting fundamentals.
Work Conditions
This role operates in a 24/7 shift-based NOC environment at UA Telecom. With full accountability for continuous system monitoring and customer service operations. It requires real-time incident detection, immediate response, and strict escalation management to ensure service continuity and rapid resolution of network and customer issues.
The position requires rotational shifts, including nights, weekends, and public holidays, and demands high responsiveness in a fast-paced, time-critical environment.
Desirable Qualifications/Plus Points:
· Certifications such as Cisco Certified Network Associate (CCNA), Cisco Certified Network Associate – Wireless (CCNA Wireless), Cisco Certified Network Professional (CCNP), and Microsoft Certified IT Professional (MCITP) are highly advantageous for this role.

Submission Guidelines
Interested candidates are encouraged to submit their applications by July 31, 2026 . To apply, please send your updated CV to vacancies@uatelecom.af
In the subject line of your email, please ensure to include the Vacancy Number and Desired Province.
Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted for the written test or interview process.

About Newlink Tourist & Travel Agency
Newlink Tourist & Travel Agency established in 2017 with License Number ATO-KBL-0326 and registered with the Ministry of Information and Culture – Tourism Department of the Islamic Republic of Afghanistan, is a private, non-political, and profit-based organization offering comprehensive travel management services.
Managed by experienced Afghan and international professionals, New Link Travel provides domestic and international flight bookings, corporate travel services, and exclusive fare programs for Travel Agencies, Walk-in Clients, NGOs, medical companies, and private sector organizations.
With a growing network of regional offices in Afghanistan and international partners in over 4 countries, Dubai, Turkey, Pakistan & Iran. We strive to deliver high-quality, efficient, and customer-centered travel solutions through both physical offices and our digital booking platform — Otatickets.com.
Otatickets.com employs an advanced system that integrates Application Programming Interfaces (APIs) and web services from travel service providers, airlines, and Global Distribution Systems (GDS). This sophisticated integration empowers the platform to offer a comprehensive range of travel options, including international flights. It is designed to accommodate a diverse clientele and features a user-friendly interface supported by advanced functionality.
Our online platform, Otatickets.com, is Afghanistan’s first B2C online flight booking portal, designed to simplify travel bookings by providing instant access to global airline networks, competitive fares, and secure online payment methods.

About Jahan University
پوهنتون جهان یکی ازپوهنتون های معتبر در افغانستان است که در سرک سه کارته نو شهر کابل فعالیت می‌کند. این پوهنتون با هدف ارائه آموزش عالی معیاری در رشته‌های مختلف علمی و مسلکی ایجاد شده و در بخش‌های چون کمپیوترساینس، اقتصاد، حقوق، طب معالجوی، و شرعیات به سطح لیسانس و ماستری فعالیت می‌نماید. پوهنتون جهان همچنان در بخش تحقیق، آموزش عملی و همکاری‌های علمی تلاش دارد تا زمینه رشد علمی محصلان را فراهم سازد
جهان گروپ: شامل پوهنتون جهان، جهان کابل، 5 انستیتیوت طبی و 17 باب لیسه عالی در شهر کابل میباشد. که حدودا 20000 شاگرد و محصل در این نهاد های آموزشی، آموزش میبیند.

Job Description
۱-رهنمایی اعضای کادر علمی و محصلان طبق مقرره تحصیلات عالی؛
۲-ارزیابی آثار و کنفرانس های علمی اعضای کادر علمی و سایر دانشمندان و ابراز نظر در رابطه به آنها؛
۳-اشتراک فعال در محافل علمی منحیث گرداننده، سخنران و یا اشتراک کننده؛
۴-اشتراک فعال در کمیته ها، مجالس و شورا های علمی؛
۵-سهمگیری مسولانه در بهبود امور پوهنحی و موسسه تحصیلات عالی مربوطه به منظور انکشاف پیشرفت علمی و حفظ منافع و مصلحت های موسسه؛
۶-ارتقای سویه ی دانش به ویژه در رشته ی اختصاصی و کسب مهارت های مانند: آموزش یک زبان معتبر بین المللی و کمپیوتر؛
۷-تهییه لکچر نوت ها و رهنمود کار های علمی – ساحوی و لابراتواری؛
۸-رهبری و اشتراک در تالیف کتابهای درسی، ممد درسی و مرجع؛
۱۰- عضو فعال در تحقیقات علمی؛
۱۱-اشتراک در امتحانات ورودی محصلان جدیدشمول؛
۱۲-سایر فعالیت ها و وظایف که در قانون تحصیلات عالی و مؤسسه تحصیلات عالی جهان پیش بینی شده است؛

Job Requirements
حد اقل دارنده تحصیلات عالی به سویه ماستر در رشته های اقتصاد،کمپیوتر ساینس، شرعیات،
حد اقل سه سال تجربه کاری در بخش تدریس در سطح پوهنتون را دارا باشد .
توانایی و مهارت برنامه های آفیس کمپیوتر راداشته باشد
تسلط کامل به زبان های ملی (دری و پشتو) و انگلیسی بلدیت داشته باشد.
توانایی رهبری و پیشبرد تحقیقات علمی را داشته باشد.

Submission Guideline
از عمومی متقاضیان گرامی که واجد شرایط هستند، خلص سوانح خویش همرای اسکن اسناد تحصیلی،تذکره تابعیت و اسکن قرارداد خط/سند تجربه کاری را با نوشتن نام پوهنحی مربوطه و ذکر ووکنسی نمبر به ایمیل آدرس های ذیل ارسال بدارند یا هارد آنرا تسلیم آمریت منابع بشری این نهاد تسلیم نمااید.

description:
Role Summary
Conducting field research in Baghlan Province, Afghanistan, or writing research reports on Afghanistan-related topics.
Requires quick work execution, competent English skills, honesty and reliability, and extensive knowledge or connections in Baghlan Province.

Duties and Responsibilities
Conducting field research in Baghlan Province, Afghanistan, or writing research reports on Afghanistan-related topics.

Job Requirements
Residing in Baghlan Province, Afghanistan; possessing basic English writing and communication skills; preference will be given to candidates with relevant government, military, or investigator experience; male candidates preferred

Submission Guidelines
Please submit your English resume on this website. Name your resume with your name and occupation. The resume should include your phone number, education, and detailed work experience (specifying position, company name, and responsibilities). Please update your resume regularly. Company staff will contact you via email; please check your inbox.

title: Customer Service Agent - English Translator.
description: About Speenkai Speenkai is Afghanistan's first and leading BPO (Business Process Outsourcing) service company, specializing in providing comprehensive administrative and technical support to Afghan-owned companies abroad. Our mission is to empower Afghan entrepreneurs and businesses operating internationally by offering high-quality, reliable support services from our base in Afghanistan. With a team of skilled professionals, we help Afghan companies streamline their operations, enhance efficiency, and achieve success. Job Summary Night-Shift Job Are you a motivated, detail-oriented professional fluent in English, and ready to grow in a dynamic environment? Speenkai, Afghanistan's first BPO service company, and Bay Master Appliance Services LLC are looking to hire experienced individuals to join our full-time night shift team as Dispatchers/Customer Service Representatives. In this role, you will take inbound calls, set appointments for customers, and dispatch technicians efficiently. The ideal candidate will take charge of daily operations, including planning, scheduling, and managing the tech force. PLEASE DO NOT APPLY IF YOU ARE NOT FLUENT IN ENGLISH to save yourself time. If you have strong communication skills, thrive under pressure, and are passionate about delivering exceptional support, we want to hear from you! Duties & Responsibilities Duties & Responsibilities 1. Receive incoming calls from clients and setup service appointments. 2. Receive incoming calls from technicians throughout the shift. 3. Keep track of daily schedule and job status throughout work schedule. 4. Respond to open email requests and inquiries via email 5. Ability to enter tickets into the CRM Job Requirements Job Requirements · Fluent in English and must possess excellent verbal and written skills. • Motivated self-starter • Office work experience • Ability to multitask in fast paced environment is crucial. • Capable of typing 45+ words per minute necessary • Customer Service skills and Conflict Resolution skills. • Telemarketing experience is a plus • Microsoft Office Products Submission Guideline This link will redirect you to an online assessment. There a video question at the end. If you don not answer, you application will not be accepted. The assessment is around 50 minutes long. Find a quiet place and stable internet. Answers from Ai and cheating cold be identified and will ruin your chances to be considered. Click on the link below, enter your email, and the assessment will be sent to your email to start. Good Luck. https://app.testtrick.com/public-invitation/e885f319cea28b209c18006ed8106143-56e8c05f9ca1d33d4a0c544fc4c87568 Functional Area Sales/Marketing Management Administrative Translation Communication Operation Data Collection Data Entry OPERATIONS Countries Afghanistan Provinces Kabul Apply Now

title: Software Developer
description:
About Hushmand Shahar Information Technology
About Hushmand Shahar Information Technology Service Company
Hushmand Shahar Information Technology Service Company is a trusted provider of IT solutions, software development, and digital transformation services in Afghanistan. Our mission is to empower businesses with innovative technology solutions that enhance efficiency, security, and scalability.
With a team of experienced professionals, we specialize in custom software development, enterprise solutions, cloud computing, and IT infrastructure services . We are committed to delivering cutting-edge solutions that help organizations stay competitive in the digital world.
Our Services
Software Development: Custom web and mobile applications using Laravel, React, Next.js, and more.
Enterprise IT Solutions: ERP, MIS, CRM, and custom business software.
IT Consultancy: Digital strategy, system integration, and cybersecurity.
Cloud Solutions: AWS, DigitalOcean, Laravel Forge, and cloud-based deployments.
E-Commerce Development: Scalable online store solutions with secure payment gateways.
Why Choose Us?
Expert Team: Skilled professionals with expertise in software engineering and IT solutions.
Quality & Security: Industry-standard practices ensuring high-performance and secure applications.
Client-Focused Approach: Tailored solutions that align with business needs.
Reliable Support: Ongoing maintenance and technical support for seamless operations.
Our Vision
To be a leading technology service provider in Afghanistan, driving digital innovation and business growth.
Our Mission
To develop reliable, scalable, and high-performance technology solutions that help businesses streamline their operations and achieve success.
Job Summary

Job Descriptions
We are seeking a highly skilled Laravel Developer to join our dynamic team at Hushmand Shahar Information Technology Service Company . The ideal candidate will have strong expertise in Laravel, PHP, and modern web development technologies and will be responsible for designing, developing, and maintaining robust, scalable, and high-performance web applications.
This role requires a deep understanding of MVC architecture, database management, and front-end technologies . As a Laravel Developer, you will collaborate with cross-functional teams to build secure applications, integrate APIs, optimize performance , and troubleshoot technical challenges.

Job Requirements
Proven experience (2+ years) as a Laravel Developer or in a similar role.
Proficiency in PHP, Laravel, MySQL, and object-oriented programming (OOP) .
Strong knowledge of MVC architecture and best coding practices.
Experience in front-end technologies (HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript, Vue.js, React, or Alpine.js).
Familiarity with Laravel Blade templating and Livewire (preferred but not mandatory).
Hands-on experience with RESTful API development and third-party API integration .
Understanding of security best practices , including data encryption and secure authentication.
Experience with queues, cron jobs, and background task processing in Laravel .
Knowledge of Git, GitHub, Bitbucket, or GitLab for version control .
Strong debugging and troubleshooting skills.
Familiarity with Agile development methodologies (Scrum, Kanban) .
Excellent problem-solving skills and ability to work independently or within a team.

Submission Guidelines
Vacancy Number: Please mention the vacancy number in the email subject line .
CV & Previous Projects: Applicants must attach their CV and a list with links of previous projects they have worked on.
Email Submission: Send your application to hushmandshahar@gmail.com before the deadline.

Submission Email
hushmandshahar@gmail.com
Apply
